# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-06-11 | **更新时间**: 07:52 (北京时间)

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[04:15]` **马肯依玛士推出 CoLOS 版本 7，这是一款用于工业喷码操作的安全且全面的软件套件**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Markem-Imaje Launches CoLOS Version 7, a Secure and Comprehensive Software Suite for Industrial Coding Operations* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **Cellares 加入新美国工业联盟，推进美国生物制药制造独立**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Cellares Joins New American Industrial Alliance, Advancing U.S. Biopharmaceutical Manufacturing Independence* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:30]` **Organon 获得美国食品和药物管理局批准扩大 TOFIDENCE 的适应症**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Organon Secures US Food and Drug Administration Approval Expanding Indications for TOFIDENCE* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
